description: Process status SoT. Keep .users/context/process-status.md mirrored after updates.

current_work.title: NVA 0.3 state-resource contract and Windows editor
current_work.note: NVA 0.3 is the current portable contract. Each character state owns revisioned idle, talking-body, an extensible versioned talking-head source/descriptor, and an object face bbox. Windows configures profile_ref; the remote Cascade endpoint remains local editor configuration. Legacy 0.1/0.2 manifests migrate explicitly. The historical sil/a/i/u/e/o implementation remains experiment evidence only; transition keys, interpolation, codec, and composition location remain held for RTX 3090 evidence rather than blocking the portable state-resource contract.

P04.name: integration_test
P04.deliverable: Core, JSON Schema, Playwright remote-call, export/reopen, legacy migration, traversal, future-version, state-isolation, and referenced-asset completeness checks pass.

P05.name: requirements_complete
P05.deliverable: Development and test stages each reached two consecutive clean adversarial reviews. Cascade state-map implementation and 3090 evidence remain a separate consumer phase.

session_end: 1. Mark completed gates done with deliverables
